title: triticum repens var. glaucum
intro: Triticum repens var. glaucum, also known as blue wild rye or glaucous wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the wheat family (Poaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Triticum repens var. glaucum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
